response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and has shipped products across multiple platforms, they fall significantly short of the core technical requirements. With only 1-2 years of C++ programming versus the required 8 years, no demonstrated technical leadership experience, and limited production cloud architecture expertise, they do not meet the minimum qualifications for this mid-senior technical lead role.
strengths: Proven ability to ship products across web, mobile, and backend platforms with strong engineering practices like TDD and CI/CD
Experience building high-performance systems handling millions of requests per second (Dunnhumby microservices infrastructure)
Demonstrated mentoring capability through creating and delivering technical workshops and training courses
concerns: Only ~1-2 years of C++ programming experience versus the required 8 years—a critical gap for this C++-focused role
No demonstrated technical leadership or formal mentoring experience in professional roles despite staff engineer titles
Limited production cloud architecture experience; infrastructure work primarily in non-C++ languages (DLang) and AWS CDK exposure lacks depth
